title: T: Fix empty /datasets — master manifest needed display-label headers
notes: Root cause: /datasets maps columns by displayLabel (annotations.find name==displayLabel), so headers must be 'Dataset name','File Path','Featured','Specific query' etc, NOT machine names. Fixed build-master-manifest.py + regenerated. Also removed GTM + dead OneTrust button (rebuild).

title: S: Onboard NAS dataset 20250721 pPaxy118 (proof)
notes: Done: /srv/gardelnas mounted RO; Caddy /gardel/* serves raw NAS files; 21 CZI previews + 32-row manifest local; master manifest row added. All 200 (app, /datasets, manifests, raw CZI, preview). Reusable: build-nas-dataset.py.

title: Q3: Serve app via Caddy with SPA fallback (fixes /datasets 404, drops python backend) [sudo]
Q1: Point DatasetBucketUrl at our server + rebuild app
notes: Build done: DatasetBucketUrl->https://128.135.108.226/data baked into app.7165...js (0 Allen refs, 1 ours); index.html loads it.

title: Q2: Generate master Dataset+Manifest.csv (031125data row + specific_query)
Q: Permanent dataset collection via /datasets page
notes: Mechanism: /datasets fetches ${DatasetBucketUrl}/Dataset+Manifest.csv (build-time const, was Allen S3 -> now https://128.135.108.226/data). Each row = a PublicDataset with specific_query that auto-opens it. 404 on /datasets is missing SPA fallback (python backend) -> fix by serving dist via Caddy with try_files.

title: P3: Serve /srv/shared via Caddy /data route (add caddy to researchers) [sudo]
notes: Verified: caddy in researchers group (running pid gid 1003), files group-readable, /data route returns 401 w/o creds and 200 with creds (manifest served through Caddy).

title: P1: Build thumbnails (czi max-proj + tif masks) via venv
notes: 182 previews (91 czi maxproj + 91 tif), 19MB, 0 failures, under /srv/shared/_derived/previews.

title: P2: Generate metadata manifest (File Path + Thumbnail + facets)
notes: 189-row manifest at /srv/shared/_derived/031125data-manifest.csv: File Path + Thumbnail URLs (/data route), Condition/Kind/Replicate/Folder/Stain panel facets. URL-encoded paths.

title: P: Add real /srv/shared dataset (031125data) to the app
notes: 91 czi (899MB, 4ch eGFPZyxin488/Phalloidin405/Vinculin647/paxillin568) + 91 frontmask tif + 6 channel_profiles csv + 1 ijm. Conditions: Control vs YComp. CZI/TIF don't render in-browser -> generating PNG previews. Validated czi->512px maxproj thumbnail.

title: K: Caddy in front of demo - self-signed HTTPS + Basic Auth, backend on loopback
notes:
setup-caddy-auth.sh: installs Caddy, rebinds demo backend to 127.0.0.1:8080, basic_auth (bcrypt via caddy hash-password), tls internal, reverse_proxy. Public URL becomes https://128.135.108.226/ . Manifest base URL -> https://128.135.108.226/nas via PUBLIC_BASE_URL in the demo unit.
Verified: Caddy 2.11.4, tls internal (self-signed for IP), basic_auth enforced (401 w/o + wrong creds), http->https 308, reverse_proxy to 127.0.0.1:8080. Fixed hash-password EOF (needed trailing newline in pipe).

title: J: Enable ufw (default-deny inbound; allow SSH/80/443)
notes:
Was a no-op before: ufw unit loaded but Status=inactive. setup-caddy-auth.sh step 5 enables it with SSH allowed first so the session is never cut.
Verified: ufw active, default-deny inbound, only OpenSSH/80/443 allowed; 8080 removed.

title: G: Local demo storage (no NAS/sudo) - synthetic dataset + manifest
notes: Verified end-to-end via demo-local.sh: 24 synthetic PNGs (Plate/Well/Condition/Channel/Timepoint), manifest.csv with File Path URLs. Local server serves app 200, manifest 200, PNG image/png 200, app.js 200. No NAS, no sudo, no Caddy. Run: bash ~/biofile-finder-deploy/demo-local.sh

title: Self-host BioFile Finder on Ubuntu box
description: Deploy the Center-for-Living-Systems/biofile-finder fork: client-side DuckDB-WASM app over self-signed HTTPS (Caddy tls internal), read-only SMB/NAS mount, CSV manifest. Full status in DEPLOY.md.

title: D: Install Caddy with tls internal (self-signed HTTPS)
C: Install cifs-utils + mount NAS read-only at /srv/nas
notes:
Real NAS mount deferred — NAS details not available yet. Local demo (bff-... G) covers the serving/manifest pipeline in the meantime.
MOUNTED read-only at /srv/gardelnas: //psd-gardelnas.uchicago.edu/Expansion (image_service, NO domain — adlocal domain caused LOGON_FAILURE). fstab _netdev,nofail,ro,gid=researchers. Creds in /etc/gardelnas.cred (600 root).

title: A: Re-home repo to /home/bff/biofile-finder (chown bff)
Q4: Verify /datasets lists + opens dataset
P4: Load manifest in app + verify previews/filtering
I: Demo exposed on public IP 128.135.108.226:8080 (decision)
notes: Operator chose to expose the unauthenticated HTTP demo on the public UChicago IP for laptop access. Verified reachable. Superseded by hardening tasks J/K below (Caddy+auth+ufw).

title: H: Run demo as always-on systemd service (boot + auto-restart)
notes: Installed /etc/systemd/system/biofile-finder-demo.service (User=dsadmin, :8080, Restart=always). enable --now done; serving 200. Replace with Caddy service once NAS path is live.

title: E: Generate manifest.csv (https BASE_URL, File Path column)
notes: Real NAS manifest delivered for 20250721 dataset (build-nas-dataset.py). Pattern proven for remaining datasets.

title: B: Smoke-test build on :8080, confirm UI renders
notes: Smoke-tested the existing build at /home/dsadmin/.../dist (pre-rehome): index 200 (title 'BioFile Finder'), app.js 2.37MB 200, app.css 178KB 200. Build verified; re-run after re-home to confirm /home/bff path.

title: Repo cloned, npm ci, web build succeeds (dist/ present)
Resolve 4 open questions (output dir, column contract, no-backend, .env)
Node 20 installed system-wide via apt
bff service account created
